mapper.insert: INSERT INTO essay_evaluation (user_id, mode, essay_text, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, result_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{mode}, #{essayText}, #{gaokaoScore}, #{maxScore}, #{band}, #{overallScore}, #{resultJson})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, mode, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, result_json, created_at, essay_text FROM essay_evaluation WHERE id = #{id}
